name: builder-product
description: AI product quality enforcement: 6 skills and 3 agents that enforce quality in AI-assisted product work. Covers feature scoping, PRD quality gates, A/B test design, metric definition, user research synthesis, and AI feature validation.

interface.shortDescription: 6 skills and 3 agents for product teams.
interface.longDescription: AI product quality enforcement: 6 skills and 3 agents that enforce quality in AI-assisted product work. Covers feature scoping, PRD quality gates, A/B test design, metric definition, user research synthesis, and AI feature validation.
defaultPrompt: Run /feature-scoping before starting a new feature.
Use prd-quality-gate to review a product requirements document.
